scenario.quick-start.name: Quick Start: The Vermilion Isles
scenario.quick-start.description: A short game in the tropical Vermilion archipelago: six small nations, a single region, a tight set of objectives. Designed to learn the game in fifteen minutes or to test its systems without a global map.
country.qs-aurelia.name: Aurelia
country.qs-koros.name: Koros
country.qs-tessari.name: Tessari Federation
country.qs-magnara.name: Magnara
country.qs-soltan.name: Soltan
country.qs-ridhana.name: Ridhana
tech.qs.civil.irrigation.name: Basic irrigation
tech.qs.civil.irrigation.description: Simple canals and pumps lift agricultural yields and stabilise the rural economy.
tech.qs.civil.factories.name: Modern factories
tech.qs.civil.factories.description: Mechanised production lines push the industrial sector and weekly revenue upward.
tech.qs.civil.smart_services.name: Digital services
tech.qs.civil.smart_services.description: A network of digital public services lifts both GDP and government popularity.
tech.qs.military.modern_doctrine.name: Modern doctrine
tech.qs.military.modern_doctrine.descrip: Reformed training and chain of command: your units react faster.
tech.qs.military.airpower.name: Air power
tech.qs.military.airpower.description: Next-generation fighters and modern recon hand you superiority in the skies.
tech.qs.military.combined_arms.name: Combined arms
tech.qs.military.combined_arms.descripti: Integrated army, air, and naval operations: a renewed doctrine and a more effective force.
tech.qs.intel.counter_intel.name: Counter-intelligence
tech.qs.intel.counter_intel.description: Internal surveillance networks and hardened protocols make life hard for foreign spies on your soil.
tech.qs.intel.agent_training.name: Agent training
tech.qs.intel.agent_training.description: A small academy trains operational personnel: a new agent joins the ranks.
tech.qs.intel.signals.name: Signals intelligence
tech.qs.intel.signals.description: Interception stations capture foreign communications and unlock propaganda operations.
tech.qs.space.satellite_basic.name: Basic satellite
tech.qs.space.satellite_basic.descriptio: A first operational satellite improves communications and accelerates research.
tech.qs.space.satellite_advanced.name: Advanced satellite constellation
tech.qs.space.satellite_advanced.descrip: A complete network of weather and science satellites: national pride peaks and research runs at full power.
event.qs.economy.market_boom.name: Market boom
event.qs.economy.market_boom.description: The Vermilion exchanges hit an unexpected high. Businesses ask what you'll do with the favourable moment.
event.qs.economy.budget_strain.name: Budget under strain
event.qs.economy.budget_strain.descripti: The state coffers are thinning out. Your economic advisors want a decision now.
event.qs.military.border_skirmish.name: Border skirmish
event.qs.military.border_skirmish.descri: A Magnaran patrol crossed the line and clashed with our border police. The press wants a response.
event.qs.diplomacy.trade_offer.name: Soltan trade proposal
event.qs.diplomacy.trade_offer.descripti: Soltan offers a bilateral deal that would lower tariffs on industrial and agricultural goods.
event.qs.social.civic_festival.name: Annual civic festival
event.qs.social.civic_festival.descripti: Cities are asking for funds for the great festival that closes the tropical season. A chance to consolidate consensus, but it costs.
event.qs.social.civic_festival.choice.sk: Let the cities manage on their own
event.qs.intel.spy_caught.name: Spy uncovered
event.qs.intel.spy_caught.description: One of our agents has been arrested in Korion. Koros wants public answers.
event.qs.opportunity.research_grant.name: Private research grant
event.qs.opportunity.research_grant.desc: An industrial consortium offers funding for your research in exchange for early access to the results.
event.qs.crisis.storm_season.name: Storm season
event.qs.crisis.storm_season.description: A series of hurricanes has hit the smaller islands. The public expects a fast response.
event.qs.crisis.storm_season.choice.mini: Minimal response to spare the budget
event.qs.diplomacy.alliance_proposal.des: With regional tension rising, two neighbours are testing the waters for a closer alliance. You must decide whom to draw closer.
event.qs.politics.reform_demand.name: Reform demands
event.qs.politics.reform_demand.descript: Confidence in the government is slipping. Civic movements are calling for institutional reform before things degrade further.
victory.qs.economic.name: Economic victory
victory.qs.economic.description: Become Vermilion's top economy by GDP. Only five rivals stand in your way.
victory.qs.military.name: Military victory
victory.qs.military.description: Control at least three nations in the archipelago. Force decides the future.
victory.qs.scientific.name: Scientific victory
victory.qs.scientific.description: Complete the advanced satellite constellation. Vermilion will watch the region from above.
victory.qs.diplomatic.name: Diplomatic victory
victory.qs.diplomatic.description: Build an alliance system covering at least 60% of the remaining nations.
victory.qs.domination.name: Archipelago dominion
victory.qs.domination.description: Control four of the six Vermilion nations. The archipelago answers to a single flag.
difficulty.easy.name: Easy
difficulty.normal.name: Normal
difficulty.hard.name: Hard
difficulty.ironMan.name: Iron Man
